Functions for initializing, reading, checking, and calculating checksums on a flash memory chip.

# Purpose
This C header file provides function declarations for interfacing with a flash memory chip. It includes functions to initialize the microcontroller's peripherals for communication with the flash chip ([`flash_init`](<#flash_init>)), read bytes from a specified address in the flash memory into a buffer ([`flash_read_bytes`](<#flash_read_bytes>)), and verify communication with the flash chip by querying the Common Flash Interface (CFI) table ([`flash_sanity_check`](<#flash_sanity_check>)). Additionally, it includes a function to calculate the checksum of a specified region of the flash memory ([`flash_calculate_checksum`](<#flash_calculate_checksum>)). The file includes necessary standard libraries for boolean and integer types, ensuring compatibility and type safety.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdbool.h`
- `stdint.h`
